positive: A stylized, symmetrical graphic composition featuring a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) portrait with eight dramatic, luminous tails. The fox should have glowing sapphire blue eyes and sleek, ethereal fur that blends into nebulae pink and deep violet. Incorporate elements of mythic foliage, floating crystalline lotus flowers, and stylized mandalas radiating from the center. The style is neo-tribal celestial art, rendered with sharp, clean lines, high contrast, and a strong emphasis on negative space and graphic silhouette. Composition must be perfect for an apparel print, centered, and suitable for direct-to-garment printing, using a limited palette of cosmic blues, purples, and magenta for strong visual impact. Studio lighting, deep depth of field, vector illustration quality.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blur, artifacts, noise, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low quality, cropped, jpeg artifacts, illegible characters
